name: Schematic Feature Flags & Entitlements API
what_it_does: Feature flags and entitlements platform with REST API designed for SaaS billing — linking feature access to billing plans, managing customer entitlements, and providing flag evaluation that automatically gates features based on subscription tier.
use_cases: Gating features behind billing plans with automatic entitlement enforcement via API
Managing which features customers on each plan can access via REST API
Evaluating feature flags with billing context for plan-aware feature rollouts
Building self-serve plan upgrade prompts by checking entitlement limits
Syncing billing plan changes to feature access without manual flag management
not_for: A/B testing and experimentation without billing entitlement focus (use Statsig or Optimizely)
Simple feature flags disconnected from subscription tiers (use LaunchDarkly or ConfigCat)
Teams without product-led growth or billing-driven feature access needs
best_when: A B2B SaaS team needs to connect feature access to billing plans with automatic entitlement enforcement, reducing manual flag management for plan-gated features.
avoid_when: Your feature flags don't need billing context, or you need experimentation capabilities beyond entitlement gating.

auth.notes: API key from Schematic dashboard. Bearer token authentication. Environment-scoped keys (dev/prod). SDK uses key for server-side evaluation. No client-side key separation — server-only SDK.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: unlimited companies and flags; generous limits for early products
pricing.notes: Focused on SaaS billing use case. Generous free tier for early-stage products. Growing startup in billing/PLG space. Integrates with Stripe for plan-based entitlement automation.

performance.rate_limits: Local SDK cache means no per-evaluation network call; API has standard rate limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for managing companies, plans, features, and flags. SDK handles evaluation with local caching. Webhook support for plan and feature events. Stripe integration for billing-driven access.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Flag evaluation is deterministic per company and plan configuration. Company and feature management operations are idempotent. Plan assignment updates replace previous plan.
known_agent_gotchas: Billing-focused design — best value when Stripe integration is configured
Company traits required for targeting — agents must send company data to Schematic
SDK caches flag state — there's propagation delay after plan changes
Newer product — integration ecosystem still growing

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. SOC2 certified. US data residency. Server-side only SDK reduces client-side key exposure risk. Billing data handled with appropriate security.
